headlines.description: New signing Cameron Archer scored one goal and created another as Sheffield United played out an entertaining 2-2 Premier League draw with Everton, earning a first point of the season for both clubs at Bramall Lane on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Everton, Sheffield Utd earn first point of season

headlines.description: Brentford's Bryan Mbeumo scored a late goal to rescue a 2-2 draw at home to Bournemouth on Saturday, as the visitors were denied their first win of the Premier League season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Mbeumo goal earns Brentford 2-2 home draw with Bournemouth

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur's Son Heung-min scored a hat-trick - his first goals of the season - as his side demolished Burnley 5-2 at Turf Moor on Saturday after the visitors had gone behind.
headlines.shortLinkText: Son hat-trick fires Spurs to 5-2 win at Burnley

headlines.description: Nottingham Forest substitute Anthony Elanga struck early in the second half to earn a 1-0 win at toothless Chelsea in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea slump to shock defeat at home to Forest

headlines.description: Erling Haaland netted a second-half hat-trick as pacesetters Manchester City maintained their 100% record in the Premier League with a 5-1 thrashing of Fulham on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland hat-trick helps City cruise to 5-1 win

events.name: Newcastle United at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: A hat-trick from teenage striker Evan Ferguson handed Brighton & Hove Albion a dominant 3-1 win over a lacklustre Newcastle United in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brighton crush Newcastle with Ferguson hat-trick
